changes.newValue: Implemented lib/characters.ts (4 characters), lib/storylines.ts (4 storylines × 5 chapters), lib/mission.ts (rotation + chapter logic)

snapshot.title: Character & storyline data layer
snapshot.description: Define all static data: 4 characters with DiceBear seeds, 4 storylines × 5 chapters each, and the mission resolution logic (date → storyline, user progress → chapter). No DB changes yet — pure TypeScript constants in lib/.

acceptanceCriteria.text: lib/characters.ts exports 4 characters with name, seed, occupation, and flee reason
lib/storylines.ts exports 4 storylines, each with 5 chapters containing briefing, two narrative beats, and resolution text
lib/mission.ts exports getStorylineForDate(date) and getUserChapter(userId, storylineId)

snapshot.implementationNotes: Implemented lib/characters.ts (4 characters), lib/storylines.ts (4 storylines × 5 chapters), lib/mission.ts (rotation + chapter logic)
